name: Lexar NM620 3500MB/s M.2 Nvme SSD – 256GB
highlights: The Lexar NM620 SSD delivers blazing-fast performance with read speeds up to 3500 MB/s and write speeds up to 3000 MB/s
Available in 256GB, 512GB, 1TB, and 2TB capacities, it offers versatile storage options
Built with 3D NAND technology and featuring an impressive MTBF of 1
8 million hours, it comes with a 5-year limited warranty
description: Lexar NM620 256GB M.2 Nvme SSD Price in Pakistan Specification Details Model Lexar NM620 Form Factor M.2 2280 Interface NVMe 1.3 Capacity Options 256GB / 512GB / 1TB / 2TB Sequential Read Speed Up to 3500 MB/s Sequential Write Speed Up to 3000 MB/s Random Read IOPS Up to 300,000 IOPS Random Write IOPS Up to 250,000 IOPS NAND Flash Type 3D NAND MTBF 1,800,000 hours Operating Temperature 0°C to 70°C Storage Temperature -40°C to 85°C Power Consumption Active: 3.6W, Idle: 0.5W Warranty 5 years limit
